titlestmt.titleproper: Delta Kappa Epsilon, Delta Chi chapter records37-4-1535
titlestmt.author: Compiled by William Fogel

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-11-22 00:01:44 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Delta Kappa Epsilon, Delta Chi chapter records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Delta Kappa Epsilon. Delta Chi Chapter (Cornell University)

did.physdesc: Minutes, lists, records, photographs, typescript history,pamphlets, directories, catalogs, brochures, memorabilia, and correspondence.
did.abstract: Minutes, membership lists, initiation records, photographs, typescript narrative history, pamphlets, directories, catalogs, brochures, and memorabilia of Delta Kappa Epsilon.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 3, 6, 13, 21, and Chapter minutes since 1936 are restricted and require written permission of either the President of Delta Chi Chapter of Delta Kappa Epsilon, the President of the Delta Chi Alumni Association, the Chapter Advisor, or the Alumni Historian for access and reproduction.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Delta Kappa Epsilon, Delta Chi chapter records, #37-4-1535. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Minutes, membership lists, initiation records, photographs, typescript narrative history, pamphlets, directories, catalogs, brochures, and memorabilia of Delta Kappa Epsilon. Includes fund raising correspondence and other papers of Walter Bruske concerning Delta Kappa Epsilon at Cornell University; petition from H. William Fogle, Alumni Secretary to the New York State Dept. of Environmental Conservation to place two Norway spruce on the New York State Famous and Historic Trees Register, 1987; and petition from the Delta Chi Association to the National Register of Historic Places. Also, "The Delta Chi Deke" newsletter, 1935-1991; 1988 Pledge Class DKE history project research tasks binder; and report of the Alumni Historian, 1988. Also, an 1870 Cornellian listing Delta Upsilon as an "Anti-Secret Society." Includes an 1870 Charter, and a 1908 replacement charter. THE CORNELL DEKE HOUSE by William Fogle. Autographed color photographs of Gerald Ford, George Bush, and George W. Bush. Also a recording of the Muskrat Ramblers Dixieland Jazz Band performing at the DKE house at Spring Weekend in May 1967.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Reproductions require the permission of the President of Delta Chi Chapter, Delta Kappa Epsilon.

p.extref: A copy of a detailed guide to the collection is available here, https://hdl.handle.net/1813/17297
A digital collection of DKE history is available here, https://ecommons.cornell.edu/handle/1813/3223.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Delta Chi chapter of Delta Kappa Epsilon was established at Cornell University in 1870.

controlaccess.subject: Greek letter societies -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.

did.unittitle: See above link for the most up to date box listing. Includes item level listings not included below. Not everything in the collection is included in the PDF link however.
Books, Bound, DKE Personal Record Blanks, DKE Quarterly Volume 1 nos 1-2.
Minute books 4 volumes (1870-1936), member donation workbook 1883-1890, Delta Alpha society record book 1874-1877, Songs of ΔKE 1917, Member book 1872-1906, Catalog of 1874
Books, Bound, DX Chapter Meeting Minutes (CMM). Newsletters, The Delta Chi Deke.
Books, Bound. Directories, Membership. Newsletters, The Delta Chi Deke. Reports.

Artifacts. Artworks. Photographs, DKE Convention Attendees. Photographs, Artifact, Brass door name plates, Photographs, Brotherhood Assembled, Yearbook. Photographs, Brotherhood Assembled. Photographs, Deke House Exterior. Photographs, Deke House Interior. Photographs, Deke House Party. Photographs, Individual Portrait. Photographs. Photographic Composite, Annual. Postcards.
Books, Bound, DX Chapter Meeting Minutes (CMM). Books, Bound.
Artifacts.

Books, Bound, DKE Songs. Books, Bound, Record. Books. Photographs, Deke House Exterior. Photographs, Deke House Interior. Photographs, Brotherhood Assembled. Also, uncatalogued petitions concerning the lodge, early versions of published studies, heraldry papers, digital data diskettes for the DKE History Program circa 1991, photographic color slides and B&W negatives. Color Slides: DKE1-054, -063, -064, -065, -073, -077. DKE2-002, -006, -007, -008, -009, -010, -011, -012, -013, -014, -018, -019, -020, -021, -022, -023, -024, -025, -026, -027, -028, -029, -030, -031, -032, -033, -034, -035, -036, -037, -038, -039, -040 and -041.
Photographs, Deke House Exterior. Photographs, Deke House Interior. Photographs, Deke House Interior. Uncataloged photographs and scrapbook pages.
Booklets. Directories, Membership. Newsletters, The Delta Chi Deke.
Artifacts.
Booklets. Documents. Documents, Photocopy. Drawings, Architectural Plan. Magazines. Photographic Composites, Annual. Posters.

Artifacts. Artworks. Books, Bound, DX Chapter Meeting Minutes (CMM). Booklets, Membership Directory. Booklets, Rushing Brochure. Correspondence. Documents. Magazines. Media, Digital Data. Newsletters, The Delta Chi Deke. Photographs, Deke House Exterior. Postcards.

Books. Booklets, Annual Newsletter & Directory. Booklets, Pledge Manual. Booklets, Rushing Brochure. Correspondence. Documents. Journals, The Deke Quarterly. Photographs, Deke House Interior. Photographs.
Seven uncataloged photograph albums marked with temporary labels: ca. 1964, 1964-66, ca. 1980, 1980, 1993, 1995 and 1996.

Booklet, Cornellian '70 (1870). Booklets, Membership Directory. Artifacts. One photograph album marked with temporary label, 1999-2000; and envelopes containing annual composite photographs with labels.
Three uncataloged photograph albums marked with temporary labels, 1992, 1994-1995 and 1997-1998.
Artifacts.
Artifacts. Artworks. Booklets. Documents, Certificate. Flyers, Campaign. Media, Digital Data. Photographs, Brotherhood Assembled. Photographs, Deke House Party. Postcards. Posters, Campaign.
Documents, Certificate. Documents. Map Sheets. Photographs, Artifact. Photographs, Brotherhood Assembled. Photographs, Deke House Party. Photographic Composites, Annual.
Three uncataloged record books and a videotape. Record books are restricted
Books, Bound, DKE Songs. Books, Record. Booklets, Membership Directory. Booklets, promotional Brochure. Booklets, Rushing Brochure. Booklets. Magazines. Media, Digital Data. Photographs.
Boxes 23-43. Additional records. See PDF guide for listing.
Catalog #9 materials

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Folders numbers for boxes 23 through 43 provided by creator.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of President Gerald Ford, George H. W. Bush, and George W. Bush, signed and inscribed to DKE. The G. W. Bush inscription congratulates DKE on their Lion Trophy.

did.unittitle: Oversize photographs
Charters
Replacement charter
Digitized items
Muskrat Ramblers Dixieland Jazz Band recording

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Use DVD-863. Recorded at the DKE house during Spring Weekend. Performers may include: Walt Koken, (banjo), H. Philip Hodes (trombone, d. 2006), Leon Oakley (cornet), John C. Bittence (bass), Jack Hockenberry (trombone), Michel Sebastiani (clarinet), John F. Geherin (drums), Roy Rubinstein (trombone), Paul Somers (piano) and Michele Sebastiani (clarinet).

did.unittitle: Muskrat Ramblers Dixieland Jazz Band recording
